name: Dialog
purpose: Interrupts the user with important information, requiring an action or decision.
whenToUse: Displaying important alerts that require acknowledgment
whenNotToUse: Non-critical information (use Snackbar or inline messages)
Complex forms or multi-step processes (use a full screen or BottomSheet)

accessibility.focus: Focus should automatically move to the dialog when opened, typically to the primary action or the first focusable element.
accessibility.dismissal: Must be dismissible via the Escape key (unless it's a critical alert requiring explicit action).

flutterMappingNotes: Use showDialog() with an AlertDialog widget.
Map container tokens to DialogThemeData or directly on AlertDialog properties (backgroundColor, shape, elevation).
Set barrierDismissible to false for destructive confirmation dialogs.
Consider useSafeArea to ensure the dialog is not obscured by system UI.
Expansion notes for DialogThemeData: actionsPadding, iconColor, surfaceTintColor.

props.title: Text('Delete Item?')
props.content: Text('Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.')
